title: Map completion evidence surface
prompt: Inspect the current launch evidence manifest, Markdown report, checks, and skill required deliverables. Identify which requirements are proven, blocked, or missing without mutating source, branches, deploys, or external accounts.
summary: Mapped current CEIP launch evidence surface against commercial-launch-readiness deliverables; manifest remains blocked with 9 completed, 5 blocked, and 1 manual-stop completion audit rows.
evidence: Current manifest snapshot at ea5cc61: phase CEIP-SAFE-FIX-ADVERSARIAL-REVIEW-UNIT-CONTRACT, launch blocked, completion_audit blocked 9/5/1/15, ledgers 55 implementation decisions / 189 rejected variants / 55 optimization reviews.

title: Add objective completion audit surface
prompt: Add a bounded repo-native completion audit section to the generated launch evidence manifest and Markdown report that maps required deliverables to current evidence, blockers, proof boundaries, and next proof commands.
summary: Repo-native completion audit surface and follow-on unit contracts are implemented in committed manifest/report/checker/test files.
evidence: Commits include 747f82f Add objective completion audit unit contract and ea5cc61 Add adversarial review unit contract; checks passed include check:launch-evidence-manifest -- --skip-probes, check:commercial-launch-readiness-report -- --skip-probes, check:progress-digest-report -- --skip-probes, focused readiness checks, Vitest focused pairs, TypeScript build, and git diff --check.

title: Refute completion claims
prompt: Challenge whether the completion audit could be mistaken for launch readiness, buyer proof, production approval, hosted/live parity, Supabase clearance, or branch approval. Add checker coverage for any weak boundary.
summary: Adversarial review preserved no-readiness boundaries: completion audit and adversarial review contracts do not clear buyer, branch, Supabase, release, production, deploy, or hosted/live gates.
evidence: Focused checker and unit coverage assert no production approval, no buyer evidence creation or acceptance, no release-readiness clearance, no Supabase advisor clearance, no branch approval, no deploy, no hosted/live parity, no launch blocker clearance, and no launch-goal completion.

title: Synthesize phase result
prompt: Summarize checks, residual blockers, untouched staged rename, and next safe adjustment. Do not claim the overall goal complete unless all required evidence is proven.
summary: Objective completion audit phase is reconciled and still blocked for launch completion; next safe adjustment should target a repo-side proof gap that does not need buyer outreach, Supabase authorization, branch mutation, owner approval, deployment, or live smoke.
evidence: Post-commit status at ea5cc61 is main ahead 181 with only pre-existing staged rename .windsurf/workflows/master.md -> .devin/workflows/master.md; manifest launch_decision remains blocked.
